description: ClassGroup global master data implementation design. Read-only; no DB writes.

targetSchema.semesterIdHandling: REMOVED from ClassGroup; moved to SemesterClassGroup join table (M:N)

migrationStrategy.phase1: Create 227 canonical ClassGroups from reference Excel (sourceType='reference_xlsx')
migrationStrategy.phase2: Map sem4 406 to canonical 227 via canonicalKey matching
migrationStrategy.phase3: Migrate sem1 36 TeachingTaskClass refs to canonical ClassGroups
migrationStrategy.phase4: Deactivate extras (isActive=false) or delete if unreferenced

teachingTaskClassReferenceMigration.strategy: For each TTC: find canonical ClassGroup by canonicalKey; update classGroupId if different
teachingTaskClassReferenceMigration.prerequisite: All canonical 227 ClassGroups must exist before TTC migration

entityListApi.change: where: { isActive: true } instead of { semesterId }

importPipeline.change: classGroupMap from global active CGs; canonicalKey matching

adminDbUi.change: Fetch global active ClassGroups; remove semester filter

optionCRationale: Each phase independently testable. Additive schema first. Data cleanup in transaction. Code changes verified with build/typecheck/lint. Final schema change last.

stageBreakdown.title: SCHEMA-PREP
stageBreakdown.description: Add canonicalKey, isActive, grade, majorName, classNumber, sourceType columns

stageBreakdown.title: CANONICAL-CLEANUP-APPLY
stageBreakdown.description: Create 227 canonical CGs, migrate sem1 TTC refs, deactivate extras

stageBreakdown.title: API-UI-GLOBAL-QUERY
stageBreakdown.description: Update ~10 files to use global ClassGroup queries

stageBreakdown.title: SEMESTERID-REMOVAL
stageBreakdown.description: Remove semesterId, add SemesterClassGroup join table

rollbackStrategy.c3: Restore from backup. Transaction rollback on error.

teachingTaskImportBlockUntil: L8-C6 CLOSED — requires global ClassGroup queries stable + import dry-run + real-import test pass

riskList.mitigation: Migrate TTC refs BEFORE deactivating old ClassGroups
Pre-migration audit of every referenced CG

riskList.risk: Import pipeline fails with global CG

roomGlobalizationNote: Room is GLOBAL_MASTER_DATA. Current schema already has no semesterId. Deferred to L9 series.
